fields.label: Kind
fields.description: Categorical discrepancy type (free-text in the stub; §23 will tighten this to a closed Select vocabulary). Examples flows will write: 'po_status_drift' (§9 Stage 3), 'grn_tolerance_breach' (§9 Stage 3), 'hsn_mismatch' (§9 Stage 3), 'deleted_post_receipt' (§9 Stage 3). FROZEN CONTRACT: the field exists, is reqd, and accepts string values; §23 may add a vocabulary table but must not remove the field or change its semantic meaning.

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Resolution state. Open = newly raised, awaiting FDE action. Resolved = FDE fixed the underlying source and confirmed. Dismissed = FDE acknowledged but no action needed (e.g. EE-side internal status code we don't care about). FROZEN CONTRACT: these three states are the minimal viable set; §23 may add intermediate states (e.g. 'In Progress', 'Escalated') but must keep Open / Resolved / Dismissed as terminal-equivalent values.

fields.label: Reference DocType
fields.description: The DocType the discrepancy is raised against (e.g. 'EasyEcom GRN Map', 'EasyEcom PO Map', 'Purchase Receipt'). Dynamic-Link pattern: controls the options for reference_name. FROZEN CONTRACT: paired with reference_name to identify the offending entity.

fields.label: Reference Name
fields.description: The specific row this discrepancy concerns (e.g. 'ECS-GRN-141653', 'PO-2026-00042'). FROZEN CONTRACT: §9+ flows write this; §23 may add resolution actions that operate on the linked doc.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: The Company this discrepancy is scoped to. Mirrors the company scoping on Sync Record / API Call / Webhook Event — the operational surface must always be filter-able per Company on multi-Company sites. FROZEN CONTRACT: required; §23 may add Company-scoped permission rules that depend on this.

fields.label: Reason
fields.description: Plain-English why-it-happened the FDE can act on. Populated by the raising flow (e.g. 'GRN 141653 received_quantity (105) exceeds PO original_quantity (100) by 5% — over-tolerance threshold (3%) breached'). FROZEN CONTRACT: required; §23 may add structured diff fields (suspected_cause, suggested_actions per §27 Error Translation) but must keep reason as the free-text human-readable narrative.

fields.label: Resolution Note
fields.description: Optional FDE note recorded when flipping status to Resolved / Dismissed. Example: 'Spoke to vendor; over-receipt is the new normal for this SKU. Increased PO original_quantity by 10 units and re-pulled.' FROZEN CONTRACT: optional; §23 may add structured resolution metadata (resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_action enum) but must keep resolution_note as the free-text reviewable note.
